security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval' blob:; worker-src 'self' blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data: blob:; font-src 'self' data:; media-src 'self' blob:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: Make Unity changes with AI, no terminal.
bundle.longDescription: Unity Vibe Studio lets non-technical teammates make Unity changes through an AI assistant — chat, drag in resources, and let it drive Unity via the Unity Vibe OS bridge.
